name: Parosa from Israel (via Greece)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend thoroughly the cheese, egg yolks, sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Add the yogurt to make a thick paste.
3. Add the melted butter or margarine.
4. Stir in the flour.
5. Beat the egg whites stiff and fold into the mixture.
6. Pour into a greased quart casserole.
7. Set the casserole into a shallow pan of water and bake uncovered in a 350°F oven for 1 hour.
8. Chill. May be served with more yogurt.
Serves 4 - 6
